title: Japanese Ramen with Cottage Cheese
description: A fusion twist on the classic Japanese noodle dish, featuring cottage cheese as a creamy addition.
instructions: Cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, whisk together the garlicky soy sauce and 1 tbsp of water.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss to coat with the soy sauce mixture.
In a separate bowl, mix the cottage cheese with a fork until smooth.
Add the chopped green onions and sesame seeds to the cottage cheese and mix well.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the noodles on a plate, followed by a dollop of the cottage cheese mixture.
Garnish with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
